## Checklist

- [ ] Commit message follows `type: short description` format
- [ ] Screenshots in `/screenshots/` (not `/images/` or `/img/`)
- [ ] JSON files validate with `python -m json.tool`
- [ ] No API keys or secrets committed
- [ ] README updated if install steps changed
